commands.cmd: read-only calorie, macro, target/range/limit, missing/ambiguity, planned-separation and accessibility audit

summary: Approved server-owned calorie, macro and semantic coverage panels with no planned/consumed summing or goal guessing.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same read-only review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: The bounded first chart Worker must be delivered and audited before richer aggregate services.
